query:
-- For each (file_name, target_folder, target_subpath, DATE(created_at)) group with status=pending,
-- keep only the newest id and mark the rest as 'skipped' with a clear error message.
UPDATE drive_push_queue d
JOIN (
  SELECT MAX(id) AS keep_id, file_name, target_folder, target_subpath
  FROM drive_push_queue
  WHERE status = 'pending'
    AND target_folder IN ('day_log','recap_reply','topics_covered','agenda_pdf')
  GROUP BY file_name, target_folder, target_subpath
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) keepers
  ON keepers.file_name = d.file_name
 AND keepers.target_folder = d.target_folder
 AND (keepers.target_subpath <=> d.target_subpath)
 AND d.id <> keepers.keep_id
SET d.status = 'skipped',
    d.error_message = 'dedupe-2026-05-21: superseded by newer pending row for same (file_name, target_folder, target_subpath)',
    d.pushed_at = NOW()
WHERE d.status = 'pending';
